forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain likely before 2am, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 54. South wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 5pm, then a chance of rain. Mostly cloudy. High near 60, with temperatures falling to around 57 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 7 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As dawn approaches over Downtown San Francisco, a blanket of clouds hangs low, ushering in the unmistakable scent of fresh rain, mixed with the distant rumble of thunder. The air is thick with anticipation, moisture weaving through the streets, as gentle showers begin to fall intermittently. A cool breeze brushes past, urging you to seek shelter or adventure, depending on your mood. The glimmer of city lights fades into the hue of a cloudy slate sky, merging with the whispers of fog that sink into every nook and cranny. The prognosis suggests this is merely the prelude; expect a day laden with showers and storms, a playful dance between the elements, before the sun might shyly reveal itself later in the day.

Dress for warmth and comfort today, favoring layers to navigate the coolness as temperatures waver. A raincoat or waterproof jacket will serve you well, perhaps paired with sturdy shoes that can withstand the slick streets. Despite the weather's gray disposition, there's beauty in the dynamic atmosphere; consider a stroll through one of the city’s cozy cafés, enjoying a steaming cup while watching the world rush by through foggy windows. Alternatively, embrace the season with a visit to an indoor gallery or bookstore, allowing the patter of rain to create an intimate soundtrack to your exploration. As the clouds promise a symphony of water and wind, find your joy in the simple moments that define these atmospheric transitions.
